scenes.narration: Meet Retenzy, an all-in-one customer retention platform launched in 2023 specifically for Shopify merchants to maximize customer lifetime value.
scenes.visual: Minimalist diagram showing a Shopify storefront connecting to a Retenzy loyalty rewards icon.

scenes.narration: It drives engagement using tiered loyalty programs and automated social proof by collecting reviews that sync directly with Google Shopping.
scenes.visual: Icons representing VIP membership tiers, customer reviews, and a Google Shopping search bar.

scenes.narration: With over fifteen no-code widgets and built-in email marketing flows, Retenzy simplifies retention without requiring custom development.
scenes.visual: A split screen displaying simple email templates and drag-and-drop promotional widgets.
